title: 084  Success secret revealed by Srila Prabhupada
speaker: HDG Srila Prabhupada

segments.text: Srila Prabhupada writes here,

They had become head of the mission and they fought in the courts neglecting the order of the spiritual master and the entire mission was defeated. We are not proud of this. However, the truth must be explained. We believed in the words of our spiritual master and started in a humble way, in a helpless way.
But due to the spiritual force of the order of the supreme authority, this movement has become successful.
Srila Prabhupada is writing,
Due to the spiritual force of the order of the supreme authority, this movement which Srila Prabhupada started humbly has now become a successful movement.
So you can see the power of obeying spiritual master.
Even though Gaudiya Math was established, Srila Bhaktisiddhanta Saraswat Thakur had established 64 centers in India and he had also sent his disciples abroad to preach.
But due to the spiritual force of the order of the supreme authority, this movement has become successful.
Even though Gaudiya Math was established, Srila Bhaktisiddhanta Saraswat Thakur had established 64 centers in India and he had also sent his disciples abroad to preach.
It was an established movement but because of disobeying the orders of guru, the entire movement failed.
It was an established movement but because of disobeying the orders of guru, the entire movement failed.
It was an established movement but because of disobeying the orders of guru, the entire movement failed.
It was an established movement but because of disobeying the orders of guru, the entire movement failed.
It was an established movement but because of disobeying the orders of guru, the entire movement failed.
It was an established movement but because of disobeying the orders of guru, the entire movement failed.
It was an established movement but because of disobeying the orders of guru, the entire movement failed.
Obeying the orders of Guru, the entire movement failed.
Srila Prabhupada being very sincere and obedient to his Guru's words,
he in a humble way just wanted to follow the order given to him.
What was the order given to Prabhupada?
Bhakti Siddhanta Saraswati Thakur had ordered Srila Prabhupada
to preach Krishna consciousness in English language in the western world.
So he simply tried to just obey.
And that spiritual force of faith on Guru and obedience to Guru
has brought about success throughout the world.
But unfortunately, even in ISKCON, after Srila Prabhupada left,
in spite of Srila Prabhupada warning many times to his disciples,
Srila Prabhupada had ordered them to form a governing body
and he had also given how the Deeksha should happen after his disappearance,
how Ritwiks have to be appointed and through Ritwik system,
how Srila Prabhupada will continue to accept disciples
and how he will remain Guru for the next 10,000 years in this movement
to preach Krishna consciousness.
He had set an order and he had written a directive to all the presidents.
